---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: type:feature
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

What should change? Sketch the approach if you have one.

## Scope

What's explicitly in scope, and what's explicitly out of scope for this request?

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you considered and why you didn't pick them.

## Additional Context

Mockups, links, related issues/PRs.
